Home Base - the Augustin

🚗 MSY → Home Base: 25–35 min by car. Add bag-wrangling buffer.
Brunch / Lunch

District Donuts · Sliders · Brew

📍 2209 Magazine St

One of Corrina's favorite fast-casual spots in New Orleans. Local chain, wild donuts, excellent burgers, and strong first stop energy. She visited in 2019 with her mom and has thought about it ever since.

🚶 District Donuts → Home Base: 12–18 min walking, or 5–10 min by car.
Saturday Sweet Detour

Loretta's Authentic Pralines 🍩

📍 2101 N Rampart St

The original Rampart Street café location. Open Thu–Sat; closed Sunday, so Sunday uses the French Market stall.

🚗 District Donuts → Loretta’s Rampart: 10–15 min by car. Easy Quarter hop after.
Afternoon · Free Time

Choose Your Own French Quarter 🗺️

A couple of free hours before check-in. Recommended crawl:

  • Trashy Diva → Fluevog → street vendors
  • Mardi Gras costume stores
  • Leroy's Place → Crescent City Conjure
  • Alternate: the Presbytère Museum or Jackson Square people-watching
If Time Permits · Open 10–5

Arthur Roger Art Gallery

📍 432 Julia St · 5-min walk from home base

Exhibit: God Snapped When She Made Water and Black Women.

4:00 PM · Check-in

the Augustin 🏠

📍 320 Saint Joseph St

Drop in, pool time, regroup, and get ready for dinner and the show.

🚗 Home Base → Superior Seafood: 15–25 min by car. Home Base → Tableau: 10–15 min by car.
8:00 PM · Dinner + Drinks

Superior Seafood Oyster Bar res TBD

📍 Superior Seafood & Oyster Bar

Iconic. Backup: Tableau, since Superior is farther from the theater. Reservation still needs locking.

🚗 Superior → Toulouse Theater: 15–25 min by car. Tableau → Toulouse: 3–8 min walking.
10:00 PM · Show

Divas Through the Decades $40 pp · Splitwise

📍 Toulouse Theater · 615 Toulouse St
👗 Dress code: pick your favorite decade. Yes, this one counts.
Late · Energy Pending

Choose Your Own Nightcap 🌙

French Quarter bars, the midnight burlesque pop-up at the Mahogany Room, live music, a late-night bite, or straight to bed. Dealer's choice.

02
Sunday
Beignets · Drag · Jazz
☀ 5:58 AM · ☽ 8:01 PM
9:00 AM · Right at Open

Loretta's Beignets 🍩

French Market location 📍 1100 N Peters St, Stall 9 · French Market

Hands-down best beignets. This Sunday-safe French Market spot is listed open 9 AM–5 PM. Praline beignets are the move; crab beignets if folks want savory.

🚗 Home Base → French Market Loretta’s: 10–15 min by car. Loretta’s → Baldwin & Co.: 8–12 min by car.
Coffee

Baldwin & Co. Coffee + Bookstore ☕📚

📍 1030 Elysian Fields Ave
~10:00 AM

JAMNOLA Art Funhouse $45 pp · Splitwise

📍 940 Frenchmen St

Then back to the Airbnb to hang, get ready for brunch, and say goodbye to Jamie. 👋

🚶 Baldwin & Co. → JAMNOLA: 5–8 min walking. JAMNOLA → Home Base: 10–15 min by car.
1:00–3:00ish PM · Brunch

Drag Brunch @ The Country Club 💃

📍 634 Louisa St
✨ Dress code: let's show up and show out.
🚗 Home Base → The Country Club: 10–18 min by car. Return is about the same.
Afternoon

Pool Time / Keep It Going 🏊

Maybe keep the party going at a bar, maybe a ridiculous amount of edibles by the Airbnb pool.

🚗 Home Base → Preservation Hall: 8–15 min by car, or 25–35 min walking. Pad for Quarter traffic.
6:15–7:00 PM · Arrive by 5:55

Preservation Hall Jazz Band 🎷 $39 pp

📍 726 Saint Peter St

One of Corrina's favorite music experiences in the world. She has been twice, and it is the only time she has ever seen her mom moved to tears by art. No two shows are the same. Tickets are half-seated / half-standing, so rotate seats as needed.

🚶 Pres Hall → French Quarter dinner spots: most are 5–15 min walking. Pres Hall → Home Base: 8–15 min by car.
~9:00 PM / maybe 7:30 near Pres Hall · Late Dinner

Dinner TBD 🍽️ deciding

In the running:

  • Mister Mao — Michelin-listed · ~$70 pp · inquiry out · 15–25 min by car from Pres Hall
  • Cochon Butcher — Michelin-listed · no reservations · close to home base · 8–15 min by car from Pres Hall
  • La Petite Grocery — James Beard Best Chef South '16 · Michelin '25 · 15–25 min by car from Pres Hall

8:00 AM · Breakfast

Two Chicks Cafe 🐥

📍 Two Chicks Cafe · around the corner

Or 7:30 AM at Ruby Slipper if folks want to Uber. Pack before breakfast: checkout is 11:00 AM.

🚶 Home Base → Two Chicks: easy walk. Home Base → Ruby Slipper: 8–15 min by car.
✈️ Breakfast → airport: budget 25–40 min from nearby breakfast spots or the French Quarter/CBD.
9:00 AM

Head to the Airport 🚗

📍 Louis Armstrong Intl (MSY)
🚗 Home Base → MSY: 25–35 min by car. Leaving around 9:00 AM keeps a comfortable buffer for the 11:55 AM flight.
11:55 AM

Flight Leaves :(((

Until next time, New Orleans. 💔⚜️

good to know

a few things to make the weekend smoother

🌡️ Early-June Weather

  • Hot and very humid: highs around 89–91°F, lows around 74°F
  • Short, heavy afternoon thunderstorms are common
  • Long days: sun up around 5:58 AM, down around 8:00 PM

🧳 Pack For It

  • Light breathable outfits and real walking shoes
  • Sunscreen, sunglasses, refillable water bottle
  • Compact umbrella or poncho
  • Swimsuit for the private pool
  • Cash for performers, tips, vendors, and queens

👗 Dress Codes

  • Sat night: Divas — pick your favorite decade
  • Sun brunch: Drag — show up and show out
  • Pres Hall: casual and comfy; it can get warm inside

💸 Splitwise Tally

Divas Through the Decades$40
JAMNOLA Funhouse$45
Preservation Hall$39
Per person$124

Plus meals and TBD late dinner split separately.

🚕 Travel Time Cheat Sheet

  • Home Base / nearby breakfast → MSY: 25–40 min by car
  • Home Base → French Quarter: 8–15 min by car, 25–35 min walking
  • Home Base → Frenchmen St: 10–15 min by car
  • Home Base → The Country Club: 10–18 min by car
  • Loretta’s locations: Rampart is Saturday; French Market is Sunday

💧 Stay Human

  • Alternate water between drinks
  • Pace edibles in the heat
  • Snack early so brunch cocktails do not sneak up

⚜️ NOLA Etiquette

  • Tip your performers: drag queens and jazz musicians run on cash
  • To-go cups are legal; open glass containers on the street are not
  • Lock dinner reservations as soon as possible
⚜ ⚜ ⚜
